tasks.command: mkdir -p .vscode/tpch_debug && python3 scripts/tpch_rewrite.py 11 > .vscode/tpch_debug/q11_full.rel && bazel build --config debug //:rel2sql_bin
tasks.label: prepare tpch q11

tasks.command: mkdir -p .vscode/tpch_debug && python3 scripts/tpch_rewrite.py 11 --no-defs > .vscode/tpch_debug/q11_solo.rel && bazel build --config debug //:rel2sql_bin
tasks.label: prepare tpch q11 (solo)
